settings.title: Settings
settings.aboutText1: This app was entirely designed and built by
settings.aboutText2: It is constantly being improved. Feel free to share your suggestions for improvements!

newShow.title: New Light Show
newShow.name: Name
newShow.model3Compat: Compatible with all sedans that support Light Show.

editor.aiMayTakeMinutes: This may take 1-3 minutes depending on track length
editor.aiConfirm: This will replace all current events. Continue?

aiPrompt.title: Describe your Light Show
aiPrompt.placeholder: Describe what your LightShow should look like...
aiPrompt.hint: Leave empty for a fully automatic show
aiPrompt.suggFireworksText: Explosive flashes on every beat, like a fireworks show with all lights blasting at drops.
aiPrompt.suggWaveText: Smooth flowing lights from front to back like ocean waves, calm and hypnotic.
aiPrompt.suggPartyText: Maximum energy! Fast blinks, strobes, all lights going crazy, non-stop party mode.
aiPrompt.suggSpookyText: Eerie slow pulses, sudden flashes in the dark, creepy breathing effects.
aiPrompt.suggRomanticText: Gentle breathing headlights, soft fades, slow elegant transitions between lights.
aiPrompt.suggAggressiveText: Hard-hitting strobes on every beat, rapid left-right alternation, maximum intensity.

timeline.loadingHint:
This may take 2 minutes
Do not quit the app
timeline.durationTooLong: This file is {{duration}} long. The maximum allowed duration is {{max}}.

parts.selectHint: Select a part on the vehicle
parts.trunkDanceHint: Trunk must be open before dancing
parts.closureMaxReached: Maximum number of actions reached for this show

export.page1Intro: To import your LightShow into your vehicle, follow these tips:
export.page1Note:
You can only have one custom LightShow in your vehicle.
To have multiple, you need multiple USB drives!
export.page1Tip: Vehicles can be finicky. To increase your chances of it working the first time:
export.page3Intro: Create a folder at the root of the drive, name it:
export.page3Warning1: Do not name it differently, no spaces and respect upper/lowercase.
export.page3FileIntro:
Place the MP3 file and the FSEQ file in this folder.
They must have
export.page3Warning2: Do not place anything else in the folder.
export.page3Tip: In Windows, if you want to see extensions to be sure: in a folder, click on
export.page4Intro: Plug your drive into your vehicle.
export.page4TipMid:
and not a USB port dedicated to charging.

Most of the time, on post-2021 models, the USB data port is in the
export.page4OutroEnd: : you will see "lightshow" directly selected as the show to launch. That means everything is good!
export.loadInvalidFile: Invalid file. Please select a .json file exported from LightShow Studio.

share.title: Share Light Show
share.description: You can export your events to a file so that a friend who has LightShow Studio can also load your Light Show.
share.noEvents: You don't have any events on the timeline yet. Place at least one event to be able to share.

flash.trunkDanceNeedsOpen: Place a trunk "Open" event first. The trunk takes ~{{seconds}}s to open before it can dance.
flash.closureLimitReached: Limit reached for {{part}} (max {{limit}} commands per show)
flash.maxEventsReached: Maximum {{max}} events per show (iOS performance limit)

tutorial.step1: Tap a white dot to select a vehicle part
tutorial.step2: You can adjust the element's parameters here (duration, effect, power...)
tutorial.step3: Tap on the timeline to place the element where you want
tutorial.step3b: Long-press an event to drag and move it on the timeline
tutorial.step4: When your show is ready, export the .fseq file to a USB drive to play it in your vehicle

load.title: Load a Light Show
load.description: You can load a Light Show created by a friend who has LightShow Studio. The events will be added to your timeline.
load.noTrack: You must first load a music track on this Light Show before you can import events.
load.warning: Warning: current events will be replaced by those from the imported file.
